reference: Hi doctor, I am having pain in my forearm. I do exercise regularly. In the past, I had pain in my tendon two years back. The doctor gave me Hifenac Sustained Release and some soft tissue relaxants; it worked. Should I take Hifenac Modified Release, which is a muscle relaxant? If yes, how should it be taken? I mean, is there any other antacid tablet required?
text: Hi doctor, I am having pain in my forearm. I do exercise regularly. In the past, I had pain in my tendon two weeks back. The doctor gave me a nice to stay with me and some soft tissue relaxin. It works. Should I take hyphenide modified one, which is a muscle relaxin? If yes, how should it be taken? I mean, is there any other antidepressant tablet required?
